name: Suffocation
definition: A hazard where creatures lose breath and gain exhaustion
full_text: A creature can hold its breath for a number of minutes equal to 1 plus its Constitution modifier (minimum of 30 seconds) before suffocation begins. When a creature runs out of breath or is choking, it gains 1 Exhaustion level at the end of each of its turns. When a creature can breathe again, it removes all levels of Exhaustion it gained from suffocating.

mechanics.suffocation_effect: 1 Exhaustion level at end of each turn
mechanics.recovery: All Exhaustion from suffocation removed when breathing resumes
